footer.description: Private Pilates & Lagree — French Riviera & Saint-Barth

intro.quote:
“True luxury is taking care of yourself with intention…
a strong body, a confident posture, a presence that is felt.”

methods.sectionTitle:
Exceptional methods
at the service of your body

method1.title: Lagree Microformer
description: The Lagree method is a high-intensity fitness revolution, designed by Sébastien Lagree in Los Angeles.
Practiced on the Microformer, this session focuses on time under tension for exceptional post-workout calorie burn.
bullets: Microformer machine transported and installed at home
Ideal for sculpting, toning, and improving endurance

method2.title: Exclusive Sculpt & Lagree
method2.description: Our 55-minute signature session combines the best of both worlds for a complete and meticulous workout.

phases.title: Lagree Microformer
phases.description: Deep muscle stimulation and no-impact cardio.

phases.title: Lower Body Pilates Sculpt
phases.description: Targeted work for toned legs and a sculpted silhouette.

method3.title: Pilates Sculpt & Flow
description: A dynamic class that combines Pilates precision with light cardio and flow.
Emphasis is on the fluid sequence of movements to sculpt the body while improving flexibility.
bullets: Use of small props (balls, rings, bands)
Alternation between toning and active stretching

method4.title: Prenatal & Postnatal Pilates
description: Adapted sessions to accompany pregnant women or new mothers in their physical practice.
bullets: Focus on the pelvic floor and deep abdominal wall
Relief of back pain related to pregnancy

method5.title: Senior Pilates / Mobility
description: Designed for seniors or anyone wishing to improve joint mobility and balance.
bullets: Work on joint range of motion

reformer.title: Exclusive Pilates Reformer
reformer.description: Soon, enjoy the power and precision of the Reformer in a confidential and high-end setting.

tariffs.title: Pricing & Packages
tariffs.validity: Packages valid for 3 months from the first session.
tariffs.footerDisclaimer: All sessions include travel and necessary equipment.

riviera.title: French Riviera
riviera.description: Sessions at your home, in your villa, or on your yacht. Bespoke coaching in the most prestigious locations on the Côte d'Azur.

stbarth.title: Saint-Barth
stbarth.description: Candice accompanies you during the winter season for your private sessions in the exclusive setting of your villa in Saint-Barthélemy.

editorial.quote:
“True luxury is taking care of yourself
with intention —
a strong body, a confident posture, a presence that is felt.”
editorial.mission: “My mission is to offer you more than just a class: a transformative experience where every movement counts.”
editorial.author: Candice

home.title: YourPilateCrush: Private Pilates & Lagree in French Riviera & St-Barth
home.description: Experience excellence in Pilates and Lagree with Candice. Bespoke private sessions at your home, villa, or yacht in French Riviera and Saint-Barth. Visible results.

about.title: About YourPilateCrush - High-End Private Coaching Expertise
about.description: Discover Candice's expertise in STOTT PILATES and Lagree. Personalized guidance to transform your body and posture with intention in exclusive locations.
